title: En Vaaku Virpanaikku Alla
overview: "En Vaaku Virpanai-kku Alla" (My Vote is Not for Sale) , a raw and energetic call to every citizen of India. This song is a bold statement against vote buying, corruption, and the selling of democratic rights. It is a pure expression of voter power, conscience, and the unwavering belief that every vote belongs to the people and the nation – not to money or muscle power.

trailers.title: என் வாக்கு விற்பனைக்கு அல்ல | En Vaaku Virpanaikku Alla | An Ashoksaravanan Political Folk | 2026
